headline: Truist cuts Norwegian Cruise Line to Hold on rising promotional activity
summary: Investing.com -- Truist Securities downgraded Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) to Hold from Buy on Thursday, citing the stock's approach to the firm's $20 price target and a rise in promotional activity across the mass-market cruise segment.

headline: Curious about Royal Caribbean (RCL) Q2 Performance? Explore Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
summary: Looking beyond Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimate forecasts for Royal Caribbean (RCL), delve into some of its key metrics to gain a deeper insight into the company's potential performance for the quarter ended June 2026.
